lastReleaseMessage: v0.57.6 - asset-scale modifier + per-type consolidation, editor previews on 24 scenes, asset_preview + map_preview boards, tile scaler + gated chunk ground, tree-density knob; Spine2D direction set

barRaise.topFinding: The tripwire the 06-08 review set has fired: a second cycle with no slice progress tips Brackish Rising to at-risk. Six commits landed since (all 2026-06-08) and every one is art-pipeline tooling (ASSET_SCALE_MASTER, 24 editor previews, asset/map preview boards, tile and tree-density knobs, Spine2D direction). The M1 product slice did not move: wave spawning, the oil-zero fail, fog of war, and the Hold the Wall mission are all still open, four reviews running. The pipeline is the most defended part of this project and the product is the least built. Freeze the art tooling and build the survival loop on placeholder art and audio.
